data.ConfigJson: {"ID":194000026,"TalkGroupID":194000021,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"呼……没想到老子竟然是在孤叶宗学会御剑，也好，那奇观雾深非花的地图就补全了，如此我就可向师门复命了。","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":194000027,"TalkGroupID":194000021,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"DialogOptionID":[194000008,194000009],"TalkDescEditor":"谁！谁在哪里！既然被你发现了，那你今天就死在这里吧！","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":194000028,"TalkGroupID":194000021,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"这地图……这里最适合进攻孤叶宗，这里可以是伏击点……孤叶宗怕是真要完蛋咯，谁不知道血炼老祖的手段，想想还有点不是滋味……老子这奸细也是当出感情了？","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":194000029,"TalkGroupID":194000021,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"孤叶宗废物成群，老子在这儿也算数一数二，连师父师姐都对我多有照拂。若是回去，以后完不成任务，怕是要被老祖直接炼化。有没有什么办法可以留在孤叶宗……","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}
